GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: THE AMOUNT OF OFFICER COMPENSATION ON LINE 13 IS NOT THE SAME AS THE AMOUNT OF COMPENSATION SHOWN ON PART VII. THE FOUNDATION IS REIMBURSED FOR A PORTION OF EMPLOYEE TIME BY ANOTHER RELATED FOUNDATION, THUS REDUCING TOTAL COMPENSATION EXPENSE. TOTAL W-2 COMPENSATION PAID IS REFLECTED IN PART VII.

ReductionExplanationStatement.ShortExplanationTxt: THE FOLLOWING DETAILS ARE FOR THE ASSET GROUP OF NON-CONTROLLING INTERESTS IN 12 PRIVATE INVESTMENT HOLDING ENTITIES INCLUDED IN 'INVESTMENTS -OTHER' ON PART II OF THE 990-PF. THE CUMULATIVE INVESTORS' CAPITAL ACCOUNT STATEMENTS FOR THE ASSET GROUP AT MARCH 31, 2023 WAS $52,451,546 AND WAS NOT A CLEAR REFLECTION OF FAIR MARKET VALUE. THE DISCOUNT BEING CLAIMED FOR LACK OF MARKETABILITY AND LACK OF CONTROL IS $16,962,546.FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $35,489,000 IS SUPPORTED BY AN INDEPENDENT VALUATION REPORT DATED SEPTEMBER 21, 2023.A VALUATION REPORT WAS OBTAINED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DETERMINING FAIR MARKET VALUE IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE FIVE PERCENT DISTRIBUTION RULE UNDER SECTION 4942. THE ADJUSTMENTS CONFORM TO USPAP AND HAVE APPLIED APPROPRIATE ADJUSTMENTS FOR LACK OF CONTROL AND LACK OF MARKETABILITY IN ARRIVING AT FAIR MARKET VALUE.
